title: Trace the permission check on a protected path
description: Follow a request from entry to data access and locate exactly where the access decision is made and on what input.
body: Steps: 1. Pick the endpoint and a low-privilege principal. 2. Trace middleware → handler → service → data layer, noting each guard. 3. Record where the decision is made and which fields it reads (principal vs request body). 4. Identify gaps: route-only checks, object-level misses, trust of client input. 5. Add the missing check at the resource boundary with a negative test. Rollback point: before moving a check between layers. Validation: a negative-principal call must be denied end to end.
